<a id="class-texture"></a>

# Texture

**Inherits:** [Resource](class_resource.md#class-resource) **<** [RefCounted](class_refcounted.md#class-refcounted) **<** [Object](class_object.md#class-object)

**Inherited By:** [Texture2D](class_texture2d.md#class-texture2d), [Texture3D](class_texture3d.md#class-texture3d), [TextureLayered](class_texturelayered.md#class-texturelayered)

Base class for all texture types.

## Description

**Texture** is the base class for all texture types. Common texture types are [Texture2D](class_texture2d.md#class-texture2d) and [ImageTexture](class_imagetexture.md#class-imagetexture). See also [Image](class_image.md#class-image).
